benefits.description: Dramatically reduced typical COVID vaccine side effects (chills, aches, headache, sleep trouble) to only a mild headachey feeling and slight jaw tightness
Significant reduction in anxiety, compared to effect of Klonopin

protocol_notes: OP had historically strong reactions to COVID vaccines including Novavax. After 8 days of GHK-Cu (2 mg), received Pfizer shot with minimal reaction. By day 11, anxiety reduction had begun on day 2 of the protocol.
